hits.title: Crafting impactful papers: Expectations and recommendations for Business and management articles.

text:
A search for "@#$%^&*()" returned 5 results in PubMed, though none appear to specifically address that exact string of characters.

The search results include various papers regarding evidence-based medicine [PMID:21701348], citation analysis in computer science [PMID:37346595], and the individuals behind research papers [PMID:32253256]. Other results include an editorial [PMID:26428536] and recommendations for crafting impactful business and management articles [PMID:38332876].
